meaning: adj.弯曲的,动摇不定的,波状的,[植](多)曲折的,之字形的
examples: The fine brushwork figure painting goes through a flexuous exploration process . 3.
The fruitful and flexuous process deserved to be called a vivid story in biomedical research field.
New Zealand silver pine of conical habit with long slender flexuous branches; adapted to cold wet summers and high altitudes.
